title: Pack of 30 Roasting Bags for Oven, 25 x 38cm Cooking Bags for Chicken Meat Fish, Multi Purpose Turkey Oven Roasting Bag
features: Food Grade Safe Material – Roasting bags for oven made from high-quality, heat-resistant material, BPA-free, non-toxic, and odorless to ensure food safety. Suitable for ovens, microwaves, and air fryers, allowing you to enjoy delicious roasted chicken with peace of mind
Locks in Juices & Flavor – Sealing design of oven bags effectively locks in moisture and flavor, keeping roasted chicken and meats tender and juicy while preserving the natural taste of ingredients

High-Temperature Resistant – Withstands temperatures up to 220°C (428°F) without breaking, making oven bags ideal for slow roasting and ensuring even heat distribution for perfectly golden and crispy results

Convenient to Use with Ties – Comes in a pack of 30 oven bags for roasting, each measuring 25×38cm, with small ties for easy sealing—no extra tools needed. Simply place the ingredients inside, secure the bag, and put it in the oven. No need to clean baking trays afterward, reducing kitchen cleanup
Versatile for Various Foods – Perfect for roasting chicken, meat, fish, vegetables, and more. Ideal for home cooking, BBQ parties, and festive gatherings, making baking easier and more delicious!
